items.claim: Anna Crutchfield's ground game is a significant weakness that will likely be exploited by Dion Barbosa.
items.quote: ground game is going to be an issue, then it's probably going to rear its ugly head here.

items.claim: Anna Crutchfield has a tendency to give up her back and takedowns when pressured.
items.quote: Crutchfield just give up her back. Give up the takedown. Give up her back.

items.claim: Dion Barbosa is physically strong and relies on a grappling-heavy style to win fights.
items.quote: she's very physically strong... She's got no game other than BJJ Black Belt, big strong Brazilian girl. Gets a hold of you, pulls you down. That's it.

items.claim: Dion Barbosa's striking is slow and technically limited.
items.quote: Now, is her striking good? No, she's a little bit older. She's a little bit slow.

items.claim: Dion Barbosa has a superior submission game compared to Anna Crutchfield.
items.quote: She's got an easy path here with the wrestling and she does have the better submission game.
